h1: How to Generate Gerber Files in Fusion 360?

headings.text: How to Generate Gerber Files in Fusion 360?
Method One: Click on "CAM Preview" to Initiate the Export
Method Two: Click on "CAM Processor" to Initiate the Export
Method Three: Click on "Export Gerber, NC Drill, Assembly and Drawing Outputs" to Initiate the Export

sections.heading: How to Generate Gerber Files in Fusion 360?
sections.text: Blog > How to Generate Gerber Files in Fusion 360? How to Generate Gerber Files in Fusion 360? by: Mia Nov 23,2023 17051 Views 0 Comments Posted in PCB Design Tutorial Gerber Fusion 360 Autodesk Once you have completed the PCB design in Fusion 360, the next step is to export production files to prepare for PCB manufacturing. Therefore, this tutorial will guide you on how to export Gerber files and Drill files in Autodesk Fusion 360. This guide uses the demo board example in Fusion 360 named "Air_Quality_Sensor." In Fusion 360, there are three options for exporting Gerber files: CAM Preview, CAM Processor, and Export Gerber, NC Drill, Assembly and Drawing Outputs. As shown in the following i...

sections.heading: Method One: Click on "CAM Preview" to Initiate the Export
sections.text: Once you have completed the PCB design in Fusion 360, the next step is to export production files to prepare for PCB manufacturing. Therefore, this tutorial will guide you on how to export Gerber files and Drill files in Autodesk Fusion 360. This guide uses the demo board example in Fusion 360 named "Air_Quality_Sensor." In Fusion 360, there are three options for exporting Gerber files: CAM Preview, CAM Processor, and Export Gerber, NC Drill, Assembly and Drawing Outputs. As shown in the following image: Method One: Click on "CAM Preview" to Initiate the Export • Select "MANUFACTURING" -> "MANUFACTURING" -> "CAM Preview" • The Manufacturing Preview window will appear, then click on the CAM...
